title: Cosmos Mandala — radial sacred-geometry bloom
title_vi: Cosmos Mandala — hoa văn đối xứng xoay
summary: A single animated wedge of petals, arcs and glowing nodes mirrored and rotated into 14-fold dihedral symmetry, slowly spinning and breathing over a soft core bloom. Pure Canvas 2D, zero deps, runs offline; deterministic and seamless.
usage_notes: RUN: double-click index.html. KEY TECHNIQUES: draw one wedge along +X (petal quadratic curves + radial glow nodes whose spread/size oscillate via integer-harmonic sines), then for S segments rotate by s*2π/S and draw the wedge twice (once mirrored with scale(1,-1)) for dihedral symmetry; the whole group rotates 2π*u (one turn) and breathes via sin(2π*u) → seamless. Additive 'lighter' glow + a central bloom. CAPTURE: ?auto=1 + window.__seek(t). TUNE: S (symmetry), rings, colours.
summary_vi: Một múi hoa văn (cánh, cung, nốt sáng) được soi gương + xoay thành đối xứng 14 cánh, quay chậm và 'thở' trên quầng sáng tâm. Thuần Canvas 2D, không lib, chạy offline; deterministic & loop liền.
notes: Batch 6/7 — Ra viết lại (bản subagent bị treo). Wedge + rotate*S + mirror scale(1,-1) = đối xứng dihedral; xoay 2π*u + breathe sin → seamless; không vòng lặp treo.
